gxcr/pka.h File Reference

An API for interfacing to the Tilera MiCA Public Key Hardware. More...


Data Structures

struct  pka_operand_t
 The pka_operand_t is the record type used to represent big integer numbers. More...
struct  pka_operands_t
 The pka_operands_t record type is used to package the entire set of input operands (big integers) of a single crypto operation. More...
struct  pka_results_t
 The pka_results_t record type is used to package up the entire set of output operands (of which there can be 0, 1 or 2) as well as other result values like the compare_result (only used for compare op), the result_cnt and the overall status. More...
struct  ecc_curve_t
 The ecc_curve_t record type is used to hold all of the parameters defining an elliptic curve over a large prime number finite field. More...
struct  ecc_point_t
 The ecc_point_t record type is used to represent a point on an elliptic curve defined over a finite field. More...
struct  dsa_signature_t
 The dsa_signature record type is used to package up the two large integer values (called 'r' and 's' in the DSA standard) into a DSA signature. More...

Defines

#define MAX_OPERAND_CNT   11
 MAX_OPERAND_CNT defines the largest number of big integer operands used by any operation in this API.
#define MAX_RESULT_CNT   2
 MAX_RESULT_CNT defines the largest number of big integers returned by any operation in this API.
#define MAX_BYTE_LEN   (130 * 4)
 The MAX_BYTE_LEN constant defines the byte length of the largest operand that the current PKA hardware supports.
#define OTHER_MAX_BYTE_LEN   (66 * 4)
 The OTHER_MAX_BYTE_LEN constant defines the byte length of the largest operand supported for certain operations like "modular exponentiation using the chinese remainder theorem":.

Enumerations

enum  gxcr_pka_err_t {
  PKA_NO_ERROR = 0, PKA_OPERAND_MISSING = -1500, PKA_OPERAND_BUF_MISSING = -1501, PKA_OPERAND_LEN_ZERO = -1502,
  PKA_OPERAND_LEN_TOO_SHORT = -1503, PKA_OPERAND_LEN_TOO_LONG = -1504, PKA_OPERAND_LEN_A_LT_LEN_B = -1505, PKA_OPERAND_VAL_GE_MODULUS = -1506,
  PKA_OPERAND_Q_GE_OPERAND_P = -1507, PKA_OPERAND_MODULUS_IS_EVEN = -1508, PKA_RESULT_MUST_BE_POSITIVE = -1509, PKA_OPERAND_FIFO_FULL = -1510,
  PKA_CMD_RING_FULL = -1511, PKA_DRIVER_TOO_BUSY = -1512, PKA_BAD_OPERAND_CNT = -1513, PKA_TRY_GET_RESULTS_FAILED = -1514,
  PKA_TRY_GET_RANDOM_FAILED = -1515, PKA_RESULT_BUF_NULL = -1516, PKA_RESULT_BUF_TOO_SMALL = -1517, PKA_BAD_RESULT_IDX = -1518,
  PKA_RESULT_FIFO_EMPTY = -1519
}
 gxcr_pka Error codes. More...
enum  pka_comparison_t { PKA_NO_COMPARE, PKA_LESS_THAN, PKA_EQUAL, PKA_GREATER_THAN }
 The pka_comparison_t enumeration is the result type for any comparisons. More...

Functions

gxcr_pka_handle_t * gxcr_pka_open (uint8_t use_big_endian)
 Initialize a PKA handle.
int gxcr_pka_close (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle)
 Close a PKA handle.
uint8_t gxcr_pka_get_endian (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle)
 Get the Handle's use_big_endian value.
void enable_driver_tracing (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, uint32_t max_num_requests)
 Enable Request Tracing.
void disable_driver_tracing (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle)
 Disable Request Tracing.
void byte_swap_cpy (void *dst_ptr, void *src_ptr, uint32_t copy_len)
 Fast Combined Byte Swap and Copy.
int gxcr_pka_from_hex_string (char *hex_string, pka_operand_t *value)
 Convert Hex ASCII String into a Big Integer.
int gxcr_pka_to_hex_string (pka_operand_t *value, char *string_buf, uint32_t buf_len)
 Convert a Big Integer into a HEX ASCII String.
pka_comparison_t pka_compare (pka_operand_t *value, pka_operand_t *comparend)
 Faster Software Comparison.
uint32_t pka_operand_byte_len (pka_operand_t *value)
 Get Operand Byte Length.
uint32_t pka_operand_bit_len (pka_operand_t *value)
 Get Operand Bit Length.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_add (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *value, pka_operand_t *addend)
 Big Integer Add function.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_subtract (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *value, pka_operand_t *subtrahend)
 Big Integer Subtraction function.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_multiply (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *value, pka_operand_t *multiplier)
 Big Integer Multiply function.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_divide (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *value, pka_operand_t *divisor)
 Big Integer Divide function.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_modulo (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *value, pka_operand_t *modulus)
 Big Integer Mod function.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_shift_left (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *value, uint32_t shift_amount)
 Big Integer Shift Left function.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_shift_right (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *value, uint32_t shift_amount)
 Big Integer Shift Right function.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_compare (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *value, pka_operand_t *comparend)
 Big Integer Comparison.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_mod_exp (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *exponent, pka_operand_t *modulus, pka_operand_t *value)
 Modular Exponentiation function.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_exp_with_crt (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *p, pka_operand_t *q, pka_operand_t *c, pka_operand_t *d_p, pka_operand_t *d_q, pka_operand_t *qinv)
 Optimized Modular Exponentiation function for RSA.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_mod_invert (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *value, pka_operand_t *modulus)
 Modular Inversion Function.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_ecc_add (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, ecc_curve_t *curve, ecc_point_t *pointA, ecc_point_t *pointB)
 Implements modular elliptic curve addition.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_ecc_multiply (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, ecc_curve_t *curve, ecc_point_t *pointA, pka_operand_t *multiplier)
 Implements modular elliptic curve multiplication.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_ecdsa_gen (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, ecc_curve_t *curve, ecc_point_t *base_pt, pka_operand_t *base_pt_order, pka_operand_t *private_key, pka_operand_t *hash, pka_operand_t *k)
 Implements the Elliptic Curve DSA Signature Generation algorithm.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_ecdsa_verify (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, ecc_curve_t *curve, ecc_point_t *base_pt, pka_operand_t *base_pt_order, ecc_point_t *public_key, pka_operand_t *hash, dsa_signature_t *signature)
 Implements the Elliptic Curve DSA Signature Verification algorithm.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_dsa_gen (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *p, pka_operand_t *q, pka_operand_t *g, pka_operand_t *private_key, pka_operand_t *hash, pka_operand_t *k)
 Implements the Original Digital Signature Generation Algorithm.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_dsa_verify (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, void *user_data, pka_operand_t *p, pka_operand_t *q, pka_operand_t *g, pka_operand_t *public_key, pka_operand_t *hash, dsa_signature_t *signature)
 Implements the Original Digital Signature Verification Algorithm.
void gxcr_pka_wait_for_results (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle)
 Wait for Results Fifo to be Non-empty.
int gxcr_pka_has_results (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle)
 Check if the Results Fifo is Non-empty.
int gxcr_pka_get_results (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, pka_results_t *results)
 Get Next Results from the Result Fifo.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_try_get_results (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, pka_results_t *results)
 Try to Get Next Results from the Result Fifo.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_result_info (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, uint8_t *opcode, uint32_t *status, void **user_data)
 Returns PKA_TRY_GET_RESULTS_FAILED (which is always < 0) if there isn't a result available right now.
int gxcr_pka_result_lengths (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, uint32_t *result_operand0_len, uint32_t *result_operand1_len)
 Get the Lengths of the Result Operand from Head of Result Fifo.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_copy_result_operand (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, uint32_t result_idx, uint8_t *result_buf, uint32_t result_buf_len)
 Copy out a Result Operand from Head of Result Fifo.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_pop_result_fifo (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle)
 Consume Head of the Result Fifo.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_get_rand_bytes (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, uint8_t *rand_bytes, uint32_t num_rand_bytes)
 Get a Block of Random Bytes.
gxcr_pka_err_t gxcr_pka_try_get_rand_bytes (gxcr_pka_handle_t *handle, uint8_t *rand_bytes, uint32_t num_rand_bytes)
 Try to Get a Block of Random Bytes.

Detailed Description

An API for interfacing to the Tilera MiCA Public Key Hardware.

The following is a trademark of Marvell Semiconductor, Inc.: Distributed Switching Architecture (DSA).
